ASHA-TN-031.english_text: Good morning. You have 2 priority patient(s) today. Patient NIK-100460: ⚠ URGENT VISIT — patient has breathlessness at rest — RED FLAG: urgent visit required. Bring medicine directly to the patient. Patient NIK-100462: ⚠ URGENT VISIT — patient is confined to bed — RED FLAG: immediate referral needed. Refer to facility immediately — do not wait for next scheduled visit. You also have 1 contact(s) to screen for TB symptoms. Please update each card after your visit.
